mari.name: Mari

skill1: Activates when landing a Full Charge attack. Affects all allies.
Damage dealt to Shield ▲ 100.09% for 3 sec.

caveats: skill2: trigger is KIT-SILENT — modeled as refresh-on-shot (near-permanent while firing); an unmeasured ⚑ estimate — if the real trigger is burst-gated this over-credits out-of-Full-Burst uptime
skill2: 'Gain Pierce for 5 sec' modeled as static hasPierce (no timed-pierce primitive); tied to the same ⚑ trigger estimate
skill1: 'Damage dealt to Shield ▲ 100.09%' unmodeled — the raid boss is partless and never shields
cadence: datamined charge/reload tuple + the SR 22-frame bolt-gap default are unmeasured ⚑ estimates (autofire would add ~15–20% shots)
